input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Orbit Analytics (conf=0.68). AVOID sycophantic tone. Expected phrasing tier: inquiry.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'sycophantic' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-015] Inquiry tier. Flattery language not grounded in signal.
